_publications._publicationTitle: A platform for rapid patient-derived cutaneous neurofibroma organoid establishment and screening

basicInfo.description: Patient-derived cNF organoid from 29-year-old female NF1 patient; established from back cNF by collagenase IV dissociation and reconstitution in Mammocult:Matrigel (3:4) ring format; NF1 deletion plus large inversion on chr17 identified by WGS
basicInfo.clinicalData: Age at surgery: 29; Sex: Female; cNF location: back; Single tumors: 8; Pooled tumors: 0; NF1 germline variants: deletion chr17 (351 bp, pos 31,332,573-31,332,924); large inversion chr17:2,514,734-40,523,190
validationMethods: IHC (S100, CD34, CD56, CD117/c-Kit, NGFR, SOX2, SOX10, PanCytokeratin)
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Department of Orthopaedic Surgery, David Geffen School of Medicine, UCLA
